# NQITA

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://via.placeholder.com/200x60/FF2D95/FFFFFF?text=NQITA" alt="NQITA" />
</p>

**AI Companion** — Terminal. Desktop. Chat.

## What is NQITA?
A persistent AI character that lives in your environment. One shared brain, multiple interfaces.

```
┌──────────────┐
│ NQITA Core   │
│ personality  │
│ memory       │
│ AI engine    │
└──────┬───────┘
       │
   ┌───┼──────────┐
   ▼   ▼          ▼
 Terminal  Desktop  Chat UI
```

## Interfaces

### Terminal Mode

$ nqita (•‿•) hey. what are we building today?

- Command generation
- Debugging help
- Script creation

### Desktop Companion

- Pixel sprite on screen
- Idle animations
- Notifications and chat bubbles

### Floating Quick-Chat

- Trigger anywhere (e.g., Ctrl+Space)
- Small popup for quick questions

## Repos
- https://github.com/nqita/nqita (core runtime)
- https://github.com/nqita/nqita-cli (terminal interface)
